text: {"acknowledges_specifics":false,"no_unverifiable_promise":false,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":true,"within_length":true,"justification":"It clearly outlines uploading proof of address and review steps and stays concise without inventing policies, but it doesn’t reference the user’s provided new address and it promises that the team will confirm the update, which is an unverifiable outcome."}
